answer:
<think> The World Baseball Classic (WBC) is an international baseball tournament. The MVP (Most Valuable Player) award is given to the best player in each pool during the tournament. In 2017, the WBC was held from March 6 to March 22. Pool C took place from March 10 to March 13. To find the nationality of the MVP from Pool C in 2017, I need to identify the player who won the award in that pool. </think>

<answer> The MVP of Pool C in the 2017 World Baseball Classic was Shohei Ohtani from Japan. </answer>
